adds.rationale: Newly-launched nuclear-thematic ETF (Jan 23 2024) gives broader fission-renaissance exposure across utilities, fuel, advanced reactors, and services than URA/CCJ alone, matching the profile's near-term SMR thesis.

news_evidence.summary: Range ETFs launched the Range Nuclear Renaissance Index ETF (NUKZ) on Jan 23 2024, tracking ~38 global companies across nuclear utilities, fuel, advanced reactors, and services.
Deloitte and other Q1 2024 utility analyses flag hyperscaler data-center load growth as a structural tailwind for nuclear baseload capacity over the next decade.

adds.rationale: Pure-play small launch and space-systems operator with a doubled backlog (>$1B, anchored by a $515M Space Development Agency contract) and visible Neutron medium-lift milestones; opens a thin rockets/spacecraft bucket dominated only by defense-adjacent LMT.

news_evidence.summary: Rocket Lab reported Q4 2023 revenue of $60M (+16% YoY) and said backlog more than doubled to >$1B, including a $515M SDA satellite contract; guided Q1 2024 revenue $92-98M.
Rocket Lab updated investors on Neutron medium-lift development milestones positioning it to compete in the medium-lift market within roughly a year.

removes.rationale: Thesis breach: deliveries weakening into Q1 2024 amid Shanghai production cuts and a BYD-led China price war, with the stock down ~40% YTD; the AI/robotics narrative is not yet supported by commercial milestones that justify holding it as an AI-wave proxy.

news_evidence.summary: Tesla cut Shanghai Model 3/Y production and reduced worker shifts after weak Jan-Feb 2024 China sales, amid intensifying competition from BYD and Xiaomi.
Tesla shares down more than 40% YTD by late March 2024 on China demand, price cuts, and margin compression concerns.

removes.rationale: AI-bucket slot underperforming the thesis: no concrete generative-AI product or revenue inflection visible by Q1 2024, and the DOJ antitrust suit (Mar 21 2024) adds regulatory drag; MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, SMH provide stronger AI-wave exposure.

news_evidence.summary: DOJ and 16 states filed a sweeping antitrust suit against Apple on March 21 2024, alleging iPhone-ecosystem monopolization.
Through Q1 2024 Apple had not announced a flagship generative-AI product or partnership, lagging Microsoft's Copilot rollout and Google's Gemini integration in the perception of the AI wave.

rationale_overall: Net effect keeps the watchlist at 12 while reshaping it toward the profile's named next waves. Nuclear gains breadth via NUKZ (joining URA and CCJ) and the rockets/spacecraft bucket gets its first pure-play in RKLB. The two removes free slots in crowded or weakening positions: TSLA's China-driven thesis breach and AAPL's lagging AI narrative plus fresh antitrust overhang.
